Patch Set 3: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

> hm, strange test 3 failure in recovery-small, not in the new test, but still I don't think we've seen this lately?

The recovery-small test 53 failed.

Console log on MDS:

 12:55:46:LustreError: 8720:0:(mdt_open.c:1687:mdt_reint_open()) ASSERTION( !lustre_handle_is_used(&lhc->mlh_reg_lh) ) failed: 
 12:55:46:LustreError: 8720:0:(mdt_open.c:1687:mdt_reint_open()) LBUG

The failures searched out on Maloo are all related to this patch.

Patch Set 3:

Are you going to fix up this patch?

Patch Set 3:

I'm afraid I don't have time to code a new solution in the coming weeks.

Topic set to "Abandon".

This patch is a candidate to be abandoned because it has been idle for a long time, or may be obsoleted by another patch that has already been landed.  If you think this patch still contains useful changes, please comment in the patch.

Patch Set 9:

if everything is fine with the fix from Bruno, please remove the negative inspection, let's land 2 patches.

Patch Set 9:

I'm in the process of testing both patches. Please give me a few days to verify that everything works. If it does work the patches will be included in the June 26 large scale test shot.

Patch Set 9: Code-Review+1

Testing on 2.6 shows it has resolved the MDS eviction issues I was expecting.

Patch Set 9: Code-Review-1

(11 comments)

I'm reluctant to block it from landing, but there are several minor issues that should be addressed.

I'm a bit indifferent about the ldlm_{is,set,clear}_reset() macros, but I thought since the patch adding those came from Bruce that this was something that you wanted to use?

Patch Set 9:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 9:

Please see the comment at the start of lustre/include/lustre_dlm_flags.h:

 *  -*- buffer-read-only: t -*- vi: set ro:
 *
 * DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE   (lustre_dlm_flags.h)
 *
 * It has been AutoGen-ed
 * From the definitions    lustre_dlm_flags.def
 * and the template file   lustre_dlm_flags.tpl

And in fact when I try to modify this file in vim I see:

 E45: 'readonly' option is set (add ! to override)

Patch Set 9:

Gave the lustre_dlm_flags.tpl a try this morning and it is not generating lustre_dlm_flags.h correctly for me. Maybe I'm missing something.

Patch Set 9:

(2 comments)

Figured out how to fix the flags generation.Also if you generate a new file you lose the nice LDLM_FL_*_MASK you have currently.Tried to move the generated header to tabs but the scripts did not like that.

Patch Set 9: Code-Review+1

It seems there are problems with the auto-generation of the LDLM_FL_ constants, so I'll give this a +1 and we can fix up the scripts in a separate patch.
Topic "Abandon" removed.
Patch Set 9: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as b1cbd2a87580e26afa07a799a897ce9881980439

parents.subject: LU-3188 osc: shorten IO calling path

commit.subject: LU-2827 ldlm: wrong handling of ldlm resends
commit.message:
LU-2827 ldlm: wrong handling of ldlm resends

If a successful reply is lost for an intent
lock request, MDS will not correctly recover
from this situation on resend. Instead, a new
lock is created.

Signed-off-by: Vitaly Fertman <vitaly_fertman@xyratex.com>
Reviewed-by: Andrew Perepechko <andrew_perepechko@xyratex.com>
Tested-by: Elena Gryaznova <elena_gryaznova@xyratex.com>
Reviewed-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey_lyashkov@xyratex.com>
Change-Id: I9a23c13313d5168d0c232fdc0acbdab330089356
Tested-by: Andrey Bondarenko <andrey_bondarenko@xyratex.com>
Xyratex-bug-id: MRP-975 MRP-1798
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/5978
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
